vars.input: We've explored the approaches and captured key decisions in a brainstorm doc; the worktree and spec are written. The design is settled and we're ready to turn it into an implementation plan with tasks.

The plan and tasks.md are written and committed at single-user-incident threshold. The brand-survival framing means substance-level review by data-integrity/security/architecture would catch issues the style panel misses before we implement.
Implementation is complete, all tasks checked off and the hook tests pass GREEN. Before opening a PR we want a multi-agent pass to catch bugs and convention issues.
Review findings are all resolved and the full test suite is green. The feature is verified and ready to commit, push, open the PR, and merge.

We just finished the GREEN implementation for a UI-touching change under app/(dashboard); jsdom can't catch CSS-layout regressions, so we need the auth-seeded headless browser nav-state gate before shipping.
